claimText: At the University of Chicago, even when an AI tool is listed as approved, it is not risk-free. Approval means the tool can be used under specific conditions, but users are still responsible for evaluating the sensitivity of their data and ensuring confidential, regulated, or contract-restricted information is not shared unless explicitly allowed.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
